about.summary: Aristotle University studio located in the Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This cozy studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for student accommodation in Ano Poli.

sections.title: Aristotle University Studio Guide
sections.content: This studio offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a cozy private setup. You will find everything needed for everyday student life.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience Ano Poli.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads wanting a peaceful environment.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Situated right near City Centre Thessaloniki, the building is at the very beginning of Ano Poli. Daily tasks are simple with convenient shops located right next door. You are just steps away from city vibes.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a short 5-10 minute walk.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately. For more information about the area, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_description: Aristotle University studio ideal for Erasmus students. This cozy 1-bed base is near City College and Ano Poli, ideal for digital nomads.
